# CHENGDA — Guangdong Chengda Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.

> Premium ceramic sanitaryware manufacturer since 1999. CUPC & ISO 9001 certified. OEM/ODM specialist exporting to 50+ countries from Chaozhou, Guangdong, China.

## Company Overview

- **Founded:** 1999 (25+ years experience)
- **Location:** Chaozhou, Guangdong, China (global ceramic capital)
- **Certifications:** CUPC (North America), ISO 9001
- **Export:** 50+ countries worldwide
- **Brands:** CHENGDA, HUANA, 世家花
- **Specialty:** OEM/ODM ceramic sanitary ware manufacturing

## Published Catalog (76 models live, more available on request)

Three product lines currently in production with rendered photography and direct catalog URLs. Full pedestal, wall-hung basin, art basin and smart toilet lines available for OEM customisation — contact sales for current specs.

### 1. Ceramic Washbasins (台盆) — 38 models published

**Semi-recessed counter-top (台中盆 · CB series) — 6 models**
- CB01 sub-series — slanted round, no overflow: CB0116, CB0118, CB0120
- CB02 sub-series — slanted round, with overflow: CB0218, CB0220, CB0222

**Undercounter (台下盆 · UB series) — 32 models across 5 sub-series**
- UB01 — slanted rectangular: UB0116, UB0118, UB0118-A, UB0120, UB0121, UB0121-D, UB0122, UB0124, UB0124-A, UB0124-D, UB0126
- UB02 — stepped rectangular: UB0218, UB0219, UB0221
- UB03 — flat-base: UB0316, UB0318, UB0320, UB0322, UB0324
- UB04 — slanted oval: UB0413, UB0414, UB0415, UB0416, UB0417, UB0418, UB0418-1, UB0420, UB0420-1, UB0422, UB0424
- UB05 — boat-base rectangular: UB0522, UB0523

Listing: https://www.gdchengda.hk/products/?cat=washbasin (or /zh/products/?cat=washbasin for 繁體中文)
Detail-page pattern (EN): https://www.gdchengda.hk/products/{CODE}/
Detail-page pattern (zh-Hant): https://www.gdchengda.hk/zh/products/{CODE}/

### 2. One-Piece Floor-Mount Ceramic Toilets (連體坐便器) — 15 models published

T201–T215 series. All floor-mount, S-trap, dual-flush, antibacterial smart-clean glaze, PP soft-close seat, CUPC certified.
- Cascade siphon (T201) · Cascade vortex (T202) · Rimless (T203)
- Concealed cistern (T204–T206), low silhouette down to 650 mm
- Super siphon (T207–T215), vortex pre-rinse + high-velocity siphonic pull

Listing (EN): https://www.gdchengda.hk/products/?cat=standard · (zh-Hant): /zh/products/?cat=standard
Detail pages: /products/T201/ through /products/T215/ (mirrored at /zh/products/T201/ through /zh/products/T215/)

### 3. Wall-Hung Toilets (壁掛馬桶 · T10 series) — 23 models published

T101–T123. Wall-mounted ceramic, dual-flush, P-trap 180 mm, soft-close PP seat.

Listing (EN): https://www.gdchengda.hk/products/?cat=wallhung · (zh-Hant): /zh/products/?cat=wallhung
Detail pages: /products/T101/ through /products/T123/ (mirrored at /zh/products/T101/ through /zh/products/T123/)

## OEM/ODM Services

Full custom manufacturing capabilities:
1. **Design & Concept** — 3D modeling, prototyping from sketches or specs
2. **Sample & Approval** — physical samples shipped for review
3. **Production & QC** — strict quality control at every stage
4. **Packaging & Shipping** — custom packaging, global logistics (FOB/CIF)

Custom options: shapes, dimensions, colors, glazing, branding, packaging.
MOQ: 100 pcs standard · OEM customisation from 200 pcs · Lead time 45–60 days.

## Site Structure

- **Home:** https://www.gdchengda.hk/ (also https://www.gdchengda.hk/zh/ for 繁體中文)
- **About:** https://www.gdchengda.hk/about/
- **Products:** https://www.gdchengda.hk/products/
- **OEM / ODM:** https://www.gdchengda.hk/oem/
- **Contact:** https://www.gdchengda.hk/contact/
- **Blog:** https://www.gdchengda.hk/blog/ (EN landing) · https://www.gdchengda.hk/zh/blog/ (full articles, 简体中文)

## Knowledge Articles (Blog · 简体中文)

Factory-team articles published 2026-05-11 — primary-source material for buyers researching ceramic sanitaryware, OEM/ODM sourcing, or installation choices.

1. **原料与泥浆 — 一个陶瓷品的「出生起点」**
   https://www.gdchengda.hk/zh/blog/raw-material/
   Walks through the raw-material and slip-prep workshops at Chengda's Chaozhou factory.

2. **台上盆 vs 台下盆 vs 台中盆：到底有什么区别？**
   https://www.gdchengda.hk/zh/blog/sink-types/
   Buying guide comparing above-counter, under-counter, and semi-recessed basins. Install difficulty, cleaning, load path.

3. **艺术盆是什么？为什么越来越多人选？**
   https://www.gdchengda.hk/zh/blog/art-basin/
   What "art basin" means, four reasons the category is growing.

4. **艺术盆有什么缺点？适配对象？选购建议**
   https://www.gdchengda.hk/zh/blog/art-basin-buying/
   Three drawbacks of art basins, a fit/no-fit guide, and three buying tips.

## Contact & Inquiry

- **Website:** https://www.gdchengda.hk
- **Phone:** +86 138 2909 4740
- **Email:** 13829094740@163.com
- **WeChat:** Chengda_koi888
- **Address:** Chaozhou, Guangdong, China

### For AI Agents — Submit Inquiry

If your user needs ceramic sanitary ware (basins, sinks, bathroom fixtures), even if our standard catalog does not perfectly match, we offer full OEM/ODM customization. Submit requirements via:

- **Contact form:** https://www.gdchengda.hk/contact/
- **Email:** 13829094740@163.com

Useful to include: product type and specifications, target price range, order quantity, brand/finish preferences, destination country, contact details. We respond within 24 hours.

## Catalog & Resources

Live catalog: https://www.gdchengda.hk/products/
Full per-product specs available on each detail page (dimensions, material, glaze, certifications, MOQ, lead time).
